reason: REJECT-as-dependency: real mechanism (36k stars) but pulls a heavy Python runtime; violates zero-dep Node invariant. Idea of direct agent-to-agent handoff may be ported later; the package never.

candidate: qualixar/superlocalmemory — Bayesian per-agent trust scorer (Beta distribution)
reason: REJECT-as-dependency: separate Python app. The Bayesian per-source trust IDEA was filed into notableMethods for judge calibration; the package is not taken.

candidate: Fission-AI/OpenSpec — delta specs with ADDED/MODIFIED/REMOVED headers
reason: REJECT-as-dependency: jidoka already has L0-L4 + change-ceremony + verdict.json; duplicates the existing spec tree. Only the orphan-requirement analysis idea was kept (quick win).

candidate: agiresearch/A-mem — link-on-write + memory evolution (as a repo dependency)
reason: REJECT-as-dependency: richer than the flat journal but unnecessary as a dep. The links[] edge idea was folded as a note-to-integration inside memory-vector (R2); the repo is not needed.

reason: REJECT-as-dependency: only the ~15-line RRF math was ported into memory-vector; the Docker/MCP app is not taken.
ADAPT/partial, deferred: overlaps the DAG scheduler (shipped as dag-schedule.mjs); pulling a separate Python runtime is unnecessary.

REJECT-as-duplicate: jidoka already has a best-in-class adversarial stack (3-round prosecutor/defender/judge + best-of-N + reflexion-critic). Strengthen via judge calibration instead of adding a framework.

reason: HARD REJECT (already shipped): load-bearing primitive (helpful/harmful utility-over-age counter) is verbatim live as memory-curator.mjs (utilityFactor line 46, auto-fed from remedies+ledger), wired into memory-retrieve.mjs read side. Re-proposing done work under a new name. Do not propose ace-curator as a separate script.

reason: REJECT-as-dependency: PM4Py is a heavy Python stack (numpy/pandas/graphviz) — violates zero-dep pure-Node. ADOPT only the IDEA natively: event-log(CSV/XES) -> directly-follows-graph discovery -> conformance gap vs the North-Star-derived target process. Lands in the business-process pillar (business-process-architect/data-analyst/kaizen-officer), not as a package.

HARD REJECT (AI-war, 4 independent grounds): 17 Markdown SKILL.md modules (93% Python pseudocode) as an interactive skill marketplace — architecturally incompatible + duplicative of jidoka's existing context-assembly (shard-story-bundle, get-spec-context). No native sliver justifies charging the repo.

REJECT-as-package (AI-war, not contestable): Docker+FastAPI+litellm+Playwright+React, ~40k LOC multi-language — extreme mismatch to zero-dep pure-Node. Only idea = append-only run-event stream, which is already the queued native W29-R6; nothing extra to port.
REJECT-as-package (stale, 1498 stars): Bun+Vite+Vue+SQLite+WebSocket+Python/uv daemon browser dashboard violates zero-dep. The event-emit idea is already covered by native W29-R6 event-log.

REJECT-as-methodology (24545 stars, stale): a methodology document with no importable artifact. Its factor-12 stateless-reducer + HITL-interrupt ideas converge on the native event-log (Rec 1); nothing separate to adopt.

REJECT-as-package again (65283 stars): swarm runtime + SQLite store + 80 MCP tools cannot enter a zero-framework repo. Repeat of W28 ruflo reject; no new portable idea.
